coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/3. 70-90% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 90% for 24:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 24:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/3. Power: 70-90%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/3. 6:00 at 60%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/3. 40-60% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 60% for 6:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 60% for 6:00. Then 30min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/3. Power: 40-60%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 3/3.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 24:00 at 130%. Then 6min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 24:00 at 130%. Then 6 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 130% × 24:00. Then 6min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 54 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 90% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 90% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
